---
title: "An Ly"
format: html
toc: false
---

:::::: hero-modern
::: hero-text
<h1>Hi, I’m An Ly</h1>

<p class="hero-quote">

“The world moves fast, but I lead with positivity.”

</p>

<p class="hero-desc">

I’m a data-driven business analytics professional with experience in <strong>Python, SQL, and statistical modeling</strong>. I specialize in transforming complex data into actionable insights.

</p>
:::

::: hero-image
<img src="anlyprofile.jpg" alt="An Ly"/>
:::

::: hero-side
<h2 class="outline-text">

DATA

</h2>

<p> Analytics • Visualization • Modeling  </p>

<p>Driving smarter decisions through data.</p>
:::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🚀 What I Do

:::::: info-grid
::: info-card
📊 <strong>Data Analysis</strong><br> Turning raw data into meaningful insights
:::

::: info-card
📈 <strong>Business Strategy</strong><br> Supporting decisions with data-driven thinking
:::

::: info-card
🤖 <strong>Modeling</strong><br> Building predictive and analytical models
:::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📬 Let’s Connect

::: {style="text-align:center; margin-top:20px;"}
<a href="profile.html" class="button btn-outline-primary">📖 Personal</a> 

<a href="experience.html" class="button btn-outline-primary">💼 Experience</a> 

<a href="cv.html" class="button btn-outline-primary">📄 View CV</a>\

<a href="contact.html" class="button btn-outline-primary">📬 Contact Me</a>
:::
